name: B.E.S. Big Core MK-2
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>艦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ビッグ・コアＭｋ－Ⅱ
name_jp_rom: Kyodai Senkan Biggu Koa Māku Tsū
desc: If you control no monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. When this card is Special Summoned, place 3 counters on it. This card cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card attacks or is attacked, remove 1 counter from this card at the end of the Damage Step. If you cannot, destroy it.
mnst_eff: If you control no monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. When this card is Special Summoned, place 3 counters on it. This card cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card attacks or is attacked, remove 1 counter from this card at the end of the Damage Step. If you cannot, destroy it.
eff: If you control no monsters, you can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. When this card is Special Summoned, place 3 counters on it. This card cannot be destroyed by battle. If this card attacks or is attacked, remove 1 counter from this card at the end of the Damage Step. If you cannot, destroy it.

eff_types: Unclassified, Trigger, Continuous, Trigger <!-- Last 2 sentences are part of the same Trigger -->
mst: Destroys battling monster at the end of the Damage Step
